examples: I had to hang the one and geld the other.
Her ship is crewed by beautiful young maids who geld every male they capture.
It was enormous with a high roof geld up by great wooden beams with Windows of stained glass as in a church, and long heavy tables and benches.
In 2000 he sought advice from Charles and Cordia Pearson, Morgan breeders, who convinced petitioner to geld his stallion and use their stallion instead.
